items.title: Nuclear Power Is Still Incredibly Inefficient - Adam Brown
You're reading way too much code
items.description:
I once generated 10,000 lines of JavaScript just to organize 100 files without reading any of it, and it worked perfectly. That ratio is exactly why the engineers who refuse to let AI touch their "important" code are falling behind. You should be using AI-generated code from Claude Code, Codex, and Grok to build test harnesses, custom debuggers, and verification systems around the code that actually matters because you're not writing slop, you're verifying your code with even more code. 

Thank you WorkOS for sponsoring! Check them out at: https://soydev.link/workos
